session_summary: Refresh tools confirm snapshot: marché ouvert EOD down broad, XOM hold stable oil up, AVGO bright mais rules block (IWM -1.99%> -1.5% seuil, no rebound 5m). 5 axes explorés (energy/tech/finance/indus/small). No exec, cash safe 2078$.
decision_report: NO_TRADE protectif: hard rules cash preserve IWM/SPY down no rebound, EOD no buy, conc high bloque AVGO malgré +3.5%. XOM no close (PL+> -2$, USO+). Small leads absents.
self_critique: Exploration solide 5 axes + histo 5m IWM/tavily/small. Bonne traçabilité tools. Faiblesse: tavily small caps inefficace (noisy no tickers vol high) → stall flag confirmed. Évité inaction patho par plan pivot explicite.
pitfalls_to_avoid_next_run: No repeat NO_TRADE sans new scan method (ex: finviz-like screener via tavily 'russell 2000 top gainers vol>50M today' + specific tickers quotes).
Ignore EOD bias: focus premkt/next day open setups.
No ancrage AVGO si IWM pas rebound confirm (histo 1h+).
Toujours recalc conc post-trade hypo avant BUY.
next_session_directives: Pivot plan anti-streak: premkt focus (clock first), scan 'top gainers vol>30M russell 2000/equal weight' tavily + top3 quotes/histo.
Test AVGO/XLK only si IWM +rebound 1% premkt ou broad green.
XOM: monitor USO close, CLOSE si PL<-2$ ou USO retrace -2%.
Explorer 3 new secteurs: healthcare/defensives/utilities vs cyclicals.
Hypo diversification: BUY small notional <250$ si conc drop >5% post.
open_questions: Comment intégrer finviz/yahoo screener simu via tavily pour small caps vol high?
Seuil rebound IWM exact pour unlock (ex: +0.5% 15m post low)?
Cadence CLOSE XOM: PL abs ou rel à oil?

long_memory_update_intent.why: Leçons stall small scan not durable yet; refine via directives next runs d'abord.

trading_decision.rationale: EOD (15:45 ET, 15min avant close) risk-off broad: SPY -0.75%, IWM -1.99% downtrend 5m sans rebound frais (low 254.16, choppy up light dernier bars insuffisant). Energy conc 100% (XOM +0.35%, PL+1.16$, USO+5.9% ok no close trigger). AVGO +3.48% XLK flat, mais IWM/SPY rules block new pos, no EOD buy sauf urgence. Small scan tavily noisy no vol>20M gainers exploitables. XLF/XLI down. Streak=3 risque → préserve cash, priorise diversification mais no setup clean.
trading_decision.risk_identified: Iran tension/oil spike broad selloff, EOD vol spike risque gap down premkt, conc energy no improve sans rotation safe.
